issues.title: Budget writer contract includes uncited mode/default semantics
issues.description: The audit record's §2.4/D1 lock asserts several implementation-driving semantics without corresponding file:line evidence in the record: the four `mode` bands (`0`, `<20`, `20-99`, `100+`), `verification_nte_usd` defaulting to `threshold_usd`, and D3's legacy-compat notes such as absent `verification_method -> api` and absent `scope -> per-project`. The rest of the contract audit is well evidenced, but these specific claims are presented as locked conclusions rather than clearly marked synthesis/inference. Because Session 1's contract requires D1-D4 to be answered with file-level evidence, this is a material evidence gap.
issues.resolution_note: Citations added to s1-audit.md §2.4 (mode bands -> docs/adoption-bootstrap.md:515-522; NTE default -> docs/adoption-bootstrap.md:503-504,524 + docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md:175-180) and D3 step 2 (absent verification_method -> api and absent threshold_scope -> project-lifetime per docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md:117-123 + docs/adoption-bootstrap.md:514,523; 'absent scope -> per-project' explicitly marked as DERIVED from the documented legacy default composed with the migrator's project-lifetime->per-project mapping at ai_router/migrate_router_config.py:132-138).
